page_desc: Kachasị ọkachamara na-adịru nwa oge email ozi iji chebe gị na nzuzo na igbochi spam.
duplicate_email_error: Adreesị adịlarị n'ọbá akwụkwọ! Gbalịa jiri mgbakwunye ozi-e pụrụ iche dị iche.
delete_confirm: Ị n'aka na ịchọrọ ihichapụ igbe mbata a?
copy_email_success: Eṅomigaghachiri ụzọ nkwalite ngwa ngwa nke ọma
privacy_content:
• Anyị anaghị echekwa ozi oge niile; a na-ehichapụ ha ozugbo.
  • Site n'iji saịtị ahụ, ị na-ekweta na ihichapụ data akpaghị aka kwa nkeji 20.
faq_content:
Kedu ogologo oge email ahụ na-adịru?

A na-ehichapụ ọbá akwụkwọ ahụ kwa nkeji 20 iji hụ na nzuzo.

Ọ bụ n'efu?

Ee, ọrụ a bụ n'efu kpamkpam.
privacy_policy_content:
• Anyị anaghị echekwa ozi oge niile; a na-ehichapụ ha ozugbo.
  • Site n'iji saịtị ahụ, ị na-ekweta na ihichapụ data akpaghị aka kwa nkeji 20.
email_taken_error: Ndo, aha a na-eji ugbu a, gbalịa ọzọ
inbox_full_desc: Ị ruteela oke. Biko mepụta email ọhụrụ.
expiry_warning: Ịdọ aka ná ntị: A ga-ebibi ozi-e a ozugbo ka nkeji iri abụọ gachara!
